tests.description: pointCloud vertex shader contains simplex noise function (snoise), not sine-hash layeredNoise
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: pointCloud vertex shader contains fbm3 function for layered noise displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: ribbonField vertex shader contains simplex noise (snoise) and fbm3, not sine-hash layeredNoise
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField uses ShaderMaterial (not PointsMaterial) after migration to GPU displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField vertex shader contains snoise and curl-noise displacement functions
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField has vertex and fragment shaders with non-trivial content
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField ShaderMaterial has uBassEnergy uniform for bass-driven macro displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.description: particleField ShaderMaterial has uTrebleEnergy uniform for fine-grain displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Treble energy affects fine-grain displacement or point size

tests.description: particleField ShaderMaterial has uTime uniform that updates each frame for time evolution
acceptanceCriteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)

tests.description: particleField draw() does not modify position buffer (GPU handles displacement, no CPU per-point loops)
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: pointCloud vertex shader uses uBassEnergy to scale fbm3 displacement amplitude (bass drives macro 3D deformation)
acceptanceCriteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.description: pointCloud vertex shader uses uTrebleEnergy with high-frequency snoise for fine-grain displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Treble energy affects fine-grain displacement or point size

tests.description: ribbonField vertex shader uses uBassEnergy with fbm3 for bass-driven 3D displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.description: ribbonField vertex shader uses uTrebleEnergy with snoise for treble fine-grain displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Treble energy affects fine-grain displacement or point size

tests.description: pointCloud vertex shader uses uTime to drift noise domain for continuous time evolution
acceptanceCriteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)

tests.description: ribbonField vertex shader uses uTime to drift noise domain for time-evolving deformation
acceptanceCriteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)

tests.description: particleField vertex shader uses uTime inside curl3/noise for time-evolving displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Deformation evolves over time (not static modulation)

tests.description: particleField has uNoiseOctaves uniform for quality-tier gated FBM complexity
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField has uMotionAmplitude uniform that respects reduced-motion scaling
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField uses additive blending with transparency and depthWrite disabled (matches pointCloud/ribbonField)
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField has per-point buffer attributes: aHueOffset, aRandom, size (matching pointCloud pattern)
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField has uPointerPos and uPointerDisturbance uniforms for pointer repulsion
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField has uPaletteHue uniform for GPU-side color computation
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField vertex shader contains HSL to RGB conversion for GPU-side color (hsl2rgb)
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: all three systems share the same noise3d.glsl source (snoise function present in all vertex shaders)
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField cleanup() still removes mesh and disposes geometry/material after ShaderMaterial migration
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField draw() does not throw with valid FrameState after ShaderMaterial migration
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField determinism preserved after ShaderMaterial migration (same seed = same base positions)
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField density and maxParticles scaling still works after ShaderMaterial migration
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: no localStorage or cookie access during particleField init/draw after ShaderMaterial migration
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField config accepts noiseOctaves, enablePointerRepulsion, enableSlowModulation alongside existing options
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField with enablePointerRepulsion=false sets uEnablePointerRepulsion uniform to 0
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: noise3d.glsl file exists as a shared GLSL module
acceptanceCriteria: Geometry deformation occurs in a ShaderMaterial

tests.description: particleField vertex shader contains uBassEnergy multiplied with curl3 for macro displacement
acceptanceCriteria: Bass energy affects large-scale displacement in 3D

tests.description: particleField vertex shader modulates gl_PointSize by uTrebleEnergy for sparkle effect
acceptanceCriteria: Treble energy affects fine-grain displacement or point size

imports: import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest';

helpers.name: defaultParams
helpers.code:
const defaultParams: VisualParams = {
  paletteHue: 180,
  paletteSaturation: 0.5,
  cadence: 0.7,
  density: 0.6,
  motionAmplitude: 1.0,
  pointerDisturbance: 0,
  bassEnergy: 0,
  trebleEnergy: 0,
  curveSoftness: 0.5,
  structureComplexity: 0.5,
  noiseFrequency: 1.0,
  radialScale: 1.0,
  twistStrength: 1.0,
  fieldSpread: 1.0,
};

helpers.name: makeFrame
